const fs = require('fs');
const path = require('path');
const sharp = require('sharp');

const buildDir = path.join(__dirname, 'build');
if (!fs.existsSync(buildDir)) {
  fs.mkdirSync(buildDir, { recursive: true });
}

// High-resolution SVG base64 icon matching the elegant dark layout in electron-main.cjs
const svgBase64 = "";
const svgBuffer = Buffer.from(svgBase64, 'base64');

async function main() {
  console.log('Generating high-res PNG and ICO icon assets for desktop build...');

  // Generate 512x512 PNG for electron-builder main icon
  await sharp(svgBuffer)
    .resize(512, 512)
    .png()
    .toFile(path.join(buildDir, 'icon.png'));
  console.log('Generated build/icon.png (512x512)');

  // Generate 256x256 PNG for ICO wrapping
  const png256Buffer = await sharp(svgBuffer)
    .resize(256, 256)
    .png()
    .toBuffer();

  // Create a standard Windows ICO header containing a single 256x256 PNG image
  const icoHeader = Buffer.alloc(6);
  icoHeader.writeUInt16LE(0, 0); // Reserved
  icoHeader.writeUInt16LE(1, 2); // Type (1 = ICO)
  icoHeader.writeUInt16LE(1, 4); // Number of images (1)

  const directoryEntry = Buffer.alloc(16);
  directoryEntry.writeUInt8(0, 0);   // Width (256, represented as 0)
  directoryEntry.writeUInt8(0, 1);   // Height (256, represented as 0)
  directoryEntry.writeUInt8(0, 2);   // Color palette (0)
  directoryEntry.writeUInt8(0, 3);   // Reserved
  directoryEntry.writeUInt16LE(1, 4); // Color planes (1)
  directoryEntry.writeUInt16LE(32, 6); // Bits per pixel (32)
  directoryEntry.writeUInt32LE(png256Buffer.length, 8); // Size of PNG data in bytes
  directoryEntry.writeUInt32LE(22, 12); // Offset of PNG data (6 bytes header + 16 bytes directory = 22)

  const icoBuffer = Buffer.concat([icoHeader, directoryEntry, png256Buffer]);
  fs.writeFileSync(path.join(buildDir, 'icon.ico'), icoBuffer);
  console.log('Generated build/icon.ico (256x256 PNG wrapped in ICO format)');
  console.log('All desktop icon assets generated successfully!');
}

main().catch(console.error);
